prs_reviewed.title: CI: Parallelize and speed up plugins-test
frontend: ObjectEventList: Fix Age column text clipping in details panel
i18n: improve the translations of the French glossary

skipped.reason: 42 PRs: sha_unchanged (no new commits since last review)
170 PRs: human_reviewed (already have human review activity)

style_guide: Commit subject format: `<area>: <SubArea>: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include `Fixes #NN`, `closes #NN`, or similar auto-close keywords in commit messages.
Approval style is warm and brief; issues CHANGES_REQUESTED for commit guideline violations before final APPROVE.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — its presence does not indicate human review.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need.
Frontend (TypeScript/React): fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing.
Backend (Go): use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first style.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic.
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker in kubernetes-sigs repos.
